message:
chore: update Cargo.lock to reflect package rename to xf

The package was renamed from x_find to xf in the previous commit's
Cargo.toml changes. This commit updates the lockfile to reflect that
rename, ensuring consistency between the manifest and lockfile.

This is a necessary housekeeping change with no functional impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
